name: Basic Spanish Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the quartered tomatoes and water in a blender jar; puree.
2. Pour the purée into a large pot, add the onion, and bring to a boil.
3. Add the rice, garlic paste, salt, Tabasco sauce, and molasses. Lower the heat and simmer, covered, until the rice has absorbed almost all the water (about 40-45 minutes).
4. Stir in the chopped tomatoes, parsley, and tomato sauce; cover and let sit for a few minutes.
5. Fry bacon crisp in a skillet; remove and blot on paper towels.
6. Saute the green pepper in the bacon drippings until just tender, then remove using a slotted spoon and add to the rice mixture.
7. Crumble the cooked bacon into the rice mixture and stir well.
8. Lightly oil the bottom of a 1-quart casserole dish; pour the rice mixture into it.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees F for 20 minutes, or until the rice is tender.
